name: good-time
description: Good Time, a tiny desktop time tracker and daily task widget.

scripts.package:mac: electron-packager . "Good Time" --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist --overwrite --asar=false --ignore="^/dist($|/)" --ignore="^/openclaw-workspace($|/)" --ignore="^/推广素材\.md$" && node scripts/apply-app-icon.js mac
